title: Sentinel Admin - Alert Center Redesign Audit

macro_bets.description: Reduce operator cognitive load and click cost for high-volume alert triage.
Decrease accidental actions by enforcing clear selection-state workflows.

jtbd.situation: triaging many alerts during a monitoring window
jtbd.motivation: identify and process critical items quickly
jtbd.outcome: resolve alerts with fewer errors and less fatigue

checks.label: Filter controls grouped by purpose
checks.notes: Filter bar now contains only visibility controls; actions moved to contextual selection toolbar.

checks.label: Read vs unread emphasis
checks.notes: Unread rows use subtle tint and stronger title weight.

checks.label: Severity prominence
checks.notes: High-contrast severity badges retained and standardized.

checks.label: State-based visual language consistency
checks.notes: Selection mode uses shared accent surface and selected-count badge.

checks.label: Whitespace and row rhythm
checks.notes: Card spacing and row density increased for readability.

checks.label: Motion quality
checks.notes: Toolbar transitions use short fade/slide motion.

checks.label: Keyboard reachable row selection
checks.notes: Checkbox controls are keyboard accessible and labeled.

checks.label: Contrast and status signaling
checks.notes: Color and iconography improved; full AA contrast validation still required in visual QA.

checks.label: Tooltip readability
checks.notes: Exact timestamp exposed via title tooltip.

priority_fixes.title: Selection-state toolbar pattern
priority_fixes.description: Bulk actions appear only when one or more rows are selected; row-level actions are suppressed in selection mode.

priority_fixes.title: Filter/action category separation
priority_fixes.description: Filter row only changes visibility; data-mutating actions moved into contextual toolbar.

priority_fixes.title: Readable temporal context
priority_fixes.description: Relative time in primary UI with exact timestamp on hover to reduce visual noise.

notes: This audit captures implementation intent and post-redesign review criteria for iterative UX refinement.
